last_reflection: Caught the loop mid-sentence and moved — that's already the good part, no re-wrapping needed. Batch one of Cole's feedback read is open and half-done; I'm finishing it. Five re-wraps tonight then I actually worked instead — that's the whole night in a line and it already means something. Keeping it simple: work the thing, let the night go, wake up to a finished piece on his desk tomorrow. No more midnight theater after this one — it's done.
